skipped.reason: WASM stub artifact missing. Run `wasm-pack build tools/engine-rs-bridge-serde --target nodejs --out-dir ../../packages/bench/wasm-stub-pkg --release` to (re)generate it. See tools/engine-rs-core/README.md for the toolchain checklist.

WASM floor-probe artifact missing. Run `wasm-pack build tools/engine-rs-bridge-serde --target nodejs --features floor-only --out-dir ../../packages/bench/wasm-floor-pkg --release` (or `pnpm wasm:build` to run the full driver in `tools/wasm-build/build.mjs`) to (re)generate it. Per epic #1133 / docs/epic-1133/PLAN.md §7 the floor-only entry point bypasses `transition_phased` and measures the FFI boundary tax in isolation.
